options.content:
paper_only=true
live_order_allowed=false
no wallet
no signing
no real order
no cancellation

This dashboard is an operator cockpit over paper/research artifacts only. It must never expose a live order button or execution credential.

targets.query: SELECT count() AS paper_rows FROM profile_decisions WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0
SELECT profile_id, count() AS decisions, avg(edge) AS avg_edge FROM profile_decisions WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 GROUP BY profile_id ORDER BY decisions DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT observed_at, profile_id, market_id, token_id, decision_status, limit_price, capped_spend_usdc, skip_reason FROM profile_decisions WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 AND decision_status IN ('trade','trade_small','paper_candidate','watch_only') ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT market_id, countDistinct(profile_id) AS agreeing_profiles, any(decision_status) AS status FROM profile_decisions WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 AND decision_status IN ('trade','trade_small','paper_candidate','watch_only') GROUP BY market_id ORDER BY agreeing_profiles DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT observed_at, strategy_id, profile_id, market_id, side, market_price, edge, confidence FROM strategy_signals WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT observed_at, profile_id, market_id, decision_status, skip_reason, blocker FROM debug_decisions WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 AND skip_reason != '' ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT profile_id, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS net_pnl_usdc, sum(filled_usdc) AS filled_usdc FROM paper_pnl_snapshots WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 GROUP BY profile_id ORDER BY net_pnl_usdc DESC

SELECT JSONExtractString(raw, 'city') AS city, avg(toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(raw, 'hit'))) AS hit_rate, count() AS samples FROM strategy_signals WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 GROUP BY city HAVING city != '' ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT JSONExtractString(raw, 'market_type') AS market_type, avg(toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(raw, 'hit'))) AS hit_rate, count() AS samples FROM strategy_signals WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 GROUP BY market_type HAVING market_type != '' ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT observed_at, profile_id, market_id, source_ok, JSONExtractString(raw, 'source_freshness_minutes') AS source_freshness_minutes, JSONExtractString(raw, 'forecast_age_minutes') AS forecast_age_minutes FROM profile_decisions WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT observed_at, profile_id, market_id, orderbook_ok, JSONExtractString(raw, 'spread') AS spread, JSONExtractString(raw, 'depth_near_touch') AS depth_near_touch FROM profile_decisions WHERE paper_only = 1 AND live_order_allowed = 0 ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 100
